message:
style: apply rustfmt formatting across five crates

Normalize line widths across fr-command, fr-conformance, fr-eventloop,
fr-runtime, and fr-store:

- Break long function signatures and method chains that exceed the
  width limit (fr-command parse_f64_arg, parse_zstore_args,
  parse_scan_args; fr-eventloop validate_delivery_slice)
- Collapse over-split expressions that fit on single lines
  (fr-conformance ACL test assertions; fr-runtime auth_required,
  acl_setuser retain, handle_acl_deluser error string)
- Canonicalize match arm return style with blocks (fr-runtime
  execute_frame Exec arm, command_error_to_resp IndexOutOfRange)
- Remove trailing whitespace (fr-store line 1692)

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
